prompt: Refactor ApiResponse.java to follow our Java 25 conventions. It's a manually-written immutable class that should be a record, uses old-style string concatenation instead of text blocks, old-style Collections.unmodifiable* instead of List.copyOf, and an if-else chain for status categories instead of a switch expression.

assertions.text: All local variables and parameters use final or final var
No method exceeds ~20 lines of logic
